statement: API/domain/builder mappers — API, domain/app model, and builder render model should be separated through mapper — api-mappers.ts, node.helpers.ts, BuilderNode, service layer.
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: Users get stable behavior while UI can evolve.
